arts.ttl: Arne Slot dismisses Liverpool theory and explains what was 'different' about Fulham loss
arts.sum: Arne Slot reacts to Liverpool's 3-2 defeat to Fulham, denying complacency is an issue for his Premier League leaders

arts.ttl: Arne Slot responds to Mo Salah slump with confident Liverpool prediction
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah was unable to have an impact in the final third as Liverpool were beaten for just the second time in the Premier League but Arne Slot insisted there is no complacency in the squad

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot says 'people want to make stories' after rare loss
arts.sum: Liverpool saw their 26-match run come to an end with a loss at Fulham - their first away defeat of the season - as Arne Slot claimed people want to create narratives around the team

arts.ttl: Arne Slot insists his Liverpool side are NOT getting complacent after the Reds suffered their second Premier League loss of the season
arts.sum: Arne Slot insisted that his Liverpool side aren't getting complacent after they fell to only their second defeat of the Premier League season on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Liverpool limping toward title with big summer rebuild required
arts.sum: Liverpool's error-strewn 3-2 defeat at Fulham won't jeopardise their Premier League title bid, but it shows how much needs to change in the summer

arts.ttl: Liverpool cannot ignore inescapable pattern as Mohamed Salah contract dilemma takes new twist
arts.sum: Liverpool verdict from Craven Cottage as Arne Slot's Reds are beaten 3-2 by Fulham to keep their Premier League advantage to 11 over Arsenal

arts.ttl: Liverpool: Arne Slot issues message on Mohamed Salah and Virgil van Dijk form after title slip-up
arts.sum: Salah and Van Dijk struggled on a difficult afternoon for Liverpool at Fulham

arts.ttl: Fulham ‘close to perfection’ in Liverpool win, says Marco Silva
arts.sum: Runaway Premier League leaders Liverpool stunned by outstanding Fulham at Craven Cottage

arts.ttl: Silva says Fulham ‘clearly the best team’ in Liverpool win
arts.sum: Marco Silva has said his Fulham side were ‘clearly the best team on the pitch in the first half’ of their 3-2 win over Liverpool. Fulham ended Liverpool’s 26-game unbeaten run in the Premier League with a first-half blitz downing the league leaders at Craven Cottage. arts.ttl: Arne Slot shocked by errors as Liverpool’s Premier League run ends at Fulham
arts.sum: Liverpool were handed their second defeat of the campaign, with Fulham responding thanks to goals from Ryan Sessegnon, Alex Iwobi and Rodrigo Muniz.
